meta.title: Portfolio - Kheir-eddine Abdellah
meta.description: Portfolio of Kheir-eddine Abdellah, a passionate web developer. Discover my projects and my journey.
header.presentation.title: About
header.presentation.body:
Hello, I'm Kheir-eddine Abdellah.
I am a passionate French web developer, I design and develop modern, smooth and immersive digital experiences. I pay close attention to detail, ergonomics and originality to deliver interfaces that are both aesthetic and efficient.
header.skills.title: Skills
header.skills.body1.prefix: I specialize in web and application development, with a solid foundation in front-end and application logic. I enjoy building clear, smooth and user-friendly interfaces, while keeping the code clean, readable and maintainable. I also pay constant attention to user experience, visual consistency and overall performance, especially with
header.skills.body2.prefix: As for tools, I rely on a simple and effective workflow to code, test, version, and regularly evolve my projects. I document my progress, organize my tasks properly, and validate my changes to deliver reliable results, especially
header.education.title: Education & Diplomas
header.education.item1:
General BAC — Lycée Hugues Libergier, Reims
General training with the acquisition of solid analytical and methodological bases. Specialties studied in 1st and Terminale classes: Digital and Computer Sciences (NSI) and Contemporary World English (AMC).
header.education.item2:
BTS SIO - SLAM track — Franklin Roosevelt High School, Reims
IT services curriculum focused on software development and business applications. Chosen track during the degree: Software Solutions and Business Applications (SLAM).
header.education.item3:
Certifications — PIX & Cambridge [B2]
Validation of digital and linguistic skills.
projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: A selection of work that shows how I design modern interfaces and useful applications, from immersive front-end experiences to practical business tools.
project.portfolio.title: Portfolio
project.portfolio.desc: Personal website showcasing my skills, projects and journey, with responsive navigation and modern UI.
project.wiki.title: Rainbow6Wiki
project.wiki.desc: Content-driven thematic wiki with fast lookup, readable layouts, structured pages and an architecture designed to scale.
project.nsi.title: NSI WebRadio
project.nsi.desc: Website gathering podcast projects from the NSI specialization class (Digital and Computer Sciences) at Lycée Hugues Libergier.
project.mp3.title: STLMP3D
project.mp3.desc: Personal project for converting Youtube videos into MP3 format locally and easily, with a modern and clear UI.
project.svt.title: SVT
project.svt.desc: Personal project for trimming videos locally to only keep content selected between two given points.
hobbies.title: Hobbies
hobbies.intro: Outside of code, I cultivate activities that strengthen my creativity, rigor and attention to detail in digital projects.
hobby.watch.title: Drawing (traditional & digital)
hobby.watch.desc: I practice drawing on paper and digitally. This helps me improve composition, attention to detail, and creativity that I reuse in my interfaces.
hobby.gaming.title: Rythm games
hobby.gaming.desc: I play rhythm games like Guitar Hero or Rock Band. This type of game greatly strengthens my focus, coordination, and consistency.
hobby.design.title: Design & Interfaces
hobby.design.desc: I like to explore visual references, create compositions, and test interaction ideas to enrich my interfaces.
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Do you have a project idea or an opportunity to offer? I am available to discuss.
contact.email.title: Email
contact.email.desc: For any professional inquiry or collaboration.
contact.github.title: GitHub
contact.github.desc: Explore my projects and technical experiments.
footer.brandText: Web and application developer. I build modern, high-performance, and user-oriented digital experiences.
console.title: Console
console.credits:
Ubuntu 24.04 LTS x86_64
Last login: today on pts/0
[OK] Interactive console initialized.

Type 'help' to list commands.
console.info.desc: Displays help for a command. Usage: info [command]
console.clear.desc: Clears the output. Option: -h to also clear local history.
console.history.desc: Displays command history stored in the browser.
console.echo.desc: Displays the text passed as argument. Usage: echo [text]
console.projects.desc: Displays the project list or one link via: projects -[number].
console.mode.desc: Toggles theme between light and dark.
console.rm.desc: Removes a random element from the index page. Special usage: rm -fr /.
console.exit.desc: Exits the console and returns to the home page.
console.lang.usage: Usage: lang [fr|en]. Available languages: French (fr), English (en).
console.rm.reboot.triggered: rm -fr / detected. Running wipe simulation on the index page...
console.unknownCommand: Unknown command: {{command}}. Type 'help' for the command list.
console.matrix.starting: Matrix animation started. Press Escape to close.
console.matrix.title: MATRIX MODE
console.flappy.starting: Flappy started. Use Space, Arrow Up, or click to jump.
console.flappy.title: FLAPPY MODE
console.flappy.start: Press Space or click to start
console.flappy.gameOver: Game over. Press Space or click to retry
